title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns · Independent Program Trial
summary: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an extensible library operations toolkit with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.
Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.
Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
